text: The ACE II genotype is associated with increased likelihood of elite physical performance compared to D allele carriers (DD+ID)
The ACE II genotype is specifically associated with endurance athletic performance
The ACTN3 RR genotype is not significantly associated with general athletic performance compared to X allele carriers
The ACTN3 RR genotype (R allele) is associated with power event performance
Genetic polymorphisms in ACE and ACTN3 show sport-discipline-specific associations, with ACE I allele favoring endurance and ACTN3 R allele favoring power events
The effect sizes of individual genetic variants on athletic performance are modest (ORs in the 1.2-1.35 range), indicating polygenic and multifactorial influences on sport performance
